test_not_tautological.reason: The f2p tests only check for string presence in source files. An agent could simply append a dead-code comment block containing all the required strings (e.g., '// isRolldown bundlerOptionsKey getBundlerOptions rolldownVersion in vite build?.rolldownOptions build?.rollupOptions [bundlerOptionsKey]') to each file without implementing the actual fix, and most string-matching tests would pass.

anti_cheating_measures.reason: The solution is in /workspace/router's git history or in /solution/solve.sh which contains the complete patch. The agent could read solve.sh or inspect the gold patch directly. Additionally, since tests are pure string matching, the agent could grep test files to discover exact expected strings.
